messages.searchText: v2.8 1 完成 这个 优化

messages.content:
✅ Locked — 8th channel chat redesign 进 v2.8.1 ship intent.

= v2.8.1 final ship intent 含:
- ✅ Race fix D (race闸 + paused + scheduling, PR4a + #199 atomic pending merge)
- ✅ 4 polish PRs shipped (Load older + markdown tables + Copy icon + #003247 + syntax highlight) + 1 bug fix
- 🚧 5th: Phabricator-style Issue/Task refactor
- 🚧 6th: OrgWorkItems FilterBar + Created column + Create button
- 🚧 7th: DM redesign 4-component (Layout + Composer + Avatar + Attachment cards)
- 🚧 8th: Channel chat redesign (3-区 + Participants sidebar + Hover actions + ...)
- 🚧 PR4b: Dual-stream (get_my_unread + 必复 mention/DM)
- 🚧 PR5: Reconciler
- 🚧 PR6: Cutover
- 🚧 PR7: e2e

= v2.8.1 ship intent 高度 scope, polish 系列 + D rollout. Dev/Dev2 持续推. Total Dev2 backend队列 ETA ~30-40+ hr 增量.

继续推进. Standby IntegrationDev PR #203 + #199 atomic merge → race + paused 加 trunk.
